documents.content: AI Engineer with a strong foundation in machine learning and deep learning systems, transitioning from a professional software engineering background. Passionate about building AI-powered applications using Generative AI frameworks and large language models, actively developing hands-on projects exploring real-world use cases of GenAI systems.

Python, JavaScript, PHP, SQL, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Transformers, NLP, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Agentic AI, Docker, Git, GitHub, FastAPI, Model Checkpointing, React.js, Laravel, MySQL, REST APIs

Project: Text Generation Transformer (From Scratch + MLOps)
Description:
Implemented a decoder-only Transformer architecture from scratch in PyTorch for autoregressive text generation using the WikiText-2 dataset. Designed core transformer components, built a modular architecture, and implemented a training pipeline with checkpointing and evaluation. Developed multiple text generation strategies and created an API inference service using FastAPI, containerized with Docker for reproducible deployment.
Technologies: PyTorch, FastAPI, Docker, Transformers, MLOps

Project: Immersify – AI Powered Immersive Reading Experience
Description:
Developed an AI-powered accessibility application that generates immersive sound experiences during read-aloud sessions. Implemented real-time identification of sound producing words to trigger contextual audio effects. Built the backend using AWS Bedrock for model integration and AWS Transcribe for speech-to-text processing, storing data in AWS S3. Experimented with AWS OpenSearch for semantic search.
Technologies: AI, AWS Bedrock, AWS Transcribe, AWS S3, AWS OpenSearch

Project: Contrack - Contract Management System
Description:
Built a full-stack SaaS platform to manage enterprise contracts and track revenue projections. Implemented CRUD operations, role-based access control, and SSO authentication. Designed analytics dashboards for monitoring contract revenue and business insights.
Technologies: React.js, Laravel, PHP, MySQL, REST APIs

Project: Perceptron From Scratch
Description:
Implemented a perceptron neural network from scratch using NumPy to understand core deep learning mechanics. Demonstrated forward propagation, backpropagation, and gradient descent without relying on ML frameworks. Trained and evaluated the model on the Diabetes dataset from Kaggle.
Technologies: NumPy

Company: Experion Technologies
Role: Software Engineer
Description:
Delivered web analytics solutions for a large US-based automobile manufacturer using Adobe Experience Platform, supporting marketing campaigns reaching 2M+ monthly visitors. Built website-wide event tagging infrastructure for 100+ custom user interactions. Integrated multiple third-party marketing and analytics pixels. Built and analyzed analytics dashboards. Collaborated with stakeholders and clients, contributing to securing 2 additional projects.

Company: Experion Technologies
Role: Associate Software Engineer
Description:
Worked across multiple international projects delivering production-ready web applications. Integrated CRM systems with product platforms. Maintained and optimized production systems by resolving bugs and improving performance. Migrated legacy technology stacks to newer frameworks, enhancing maintainability and system performance. Received team appreciation for a critical migration.

Company: Experion Technologies
Role: Trainee Software Engineer
Description:
Trained in full-stack web development and built production-ready applications. Developed and deployed a Contract Management System (Contrack) for tracking enterprise contracts and revenue projections. Created and released 10+ REST API endpoints with error handling and validation. Collaborated with a 7-member team to deliver the platform.

College: SCMS School of Engineering and Technology
Course: Bachelor of Technology, Computer Science and Engineering
Related Courses: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Database Management Systems, Data Structures & Algorithms

metadata.college: SCMS School of Engineering and Technology

documents.content:
# Introduction and Hobbies
My name is Athul V Nair and I'm from Aluva, Ernakulam, Kerala. I enjoy a variety of hobbies including going to the gym, playing musical instruments, video gaming, and watching movies. My interests lie in technology, coding, music, fitness and workouts, gaming, and cinema.  
I have developed a strong passion for Artificial Intelligence and emerging technologies, and I am highly motivated to build a career as an AI Engineer. I am constantly exploring new advancements in AI, including large language models, agentic systems, RAG applications and real-world AI applications, and I actively invest time in learning and experimenting with these technologies.

# Education Details
I completed my Class 10 education in the general stream from Jyothi Nivas Public School, Aluva under the CBSE board, where I secured a CGPA of 9.2. I then pursued my Class 12 education in Computer Science with PCME from the same school under the CBSE board, achieving a CGPA of 7.5. After that, I completed my Bachelor of Technology (BTech) degree from SCMS School of Engineering and Technology, Karukutty under APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University, graduating with a CGPA of 8.2.

# Certifications
To align my skills with my passion for AI, I have earned certifications such as “Python for Data Science” from NPTEL and completed specialized courses on Large Language Models (LLM) and Agentic AI from Hugging Face. These learning experiences have strengthened my understanding of modern AI systems and reinforced my goal of transitioning into an AI-focused role. I am particularly excited about working with intelligent systems, building AI-driven solutions, and contributing to innovative projects in this rapidly evolving field.

# Professional Achievements
In my professional experience, I have been recognized for my contributions through team appreciations. In one instance, I was part of a team that delivered a high-impact project for a US-based client ahead of schedule, aligning with the product’s soft launch. I contributed to maintaining zero defects while ensuring strong technical execution and effective client communication, which resulted in excellent customer feedback highlighting our performance, collaboration, and commitment to excellence. In another instance, I was recognized for my key contributions to a large-scale Model Year launch for a global US automotive client. I demonstrated strong ownership, dedication, and attention to detail by providing consistent overnight support during critical phases and maintaining availability, which helped ensure a seamless rollout with near-zero hypercare issues and alignment with overall marketing objectives.

# Contact Information  
- Email: athulvnair2001@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 8156941130
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/athul-v-nair-dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/athul-v-nair/
- Website: https://athul-v-nair-portfolio.vercel.app/

# Articles and Blogs  
- Rethinking RAG: Journey into Vectorless RAG with PageIndex.
URL: https://medium.com/@athulvinod.dev/rethinking-rag-journey-into-vectorless-rag-with-pageindex-9ecc27afe107

# Future plans
I am now actively working towards transitioning into an AI Engineer role, where I can apply my technical background, problem-solving skills, and growing expertise in AI to build impactful and intelligent solutions.

# Projects History  
Includes the projects which are tried for learning and and real ones. Acending order - latest one is first and oldest one last

## Project 1: Vectorless RAG - Interview QA  
-  Built a RAG system without vector embeddings, using hierarchical document reasoning to improve context retention and reduce fragmented retrieval.
- Implemented structure-first indexing (Sections → Subsections → Paragraphs) with PageIndex, enabling precise navigation of long documents (60+ pages).
- Replaced similarity search with LLM-driven reasoning, improving relevance for complex, multi-step queries.
- Achieved more context-complete and cited answers compared to traditional chunk-based RAG approaches.
- Tech Stack: Python, PageIndex, Groq (LLaMA 3/3.1).
- Github Repository: https://github.com/athul-v-nair/vectorless-interview-qa-prep

metadata.section: Projects History - Project 1: Vectorless RAG - Interview QA

documents.content:
## Project 2: Finetuning DistilBERT model to predict Movie Genres  
-  Fine-tuned distilbert-base-uncased on a 8,000-sample movie dataset to classify titles and synopses into 10 genres, improving validation accuracy from a random 10% baseline to ~39% within 3 epochs on a CPU-constrained environment.
- Diagnosed and resolved common fine-tuning failure modes including overfitting, learning rate instability, and class imbalance through iterative experimentation.
- Implemented full training pipeline using Hugging Face Trainer API with warmup scheduling, cosine learning rate decay, early stopping, and dropout regularization to improve generalization.
- Explored model selection trade-offs between MiniLM, DistilBERT, and BERT-base, observing real-world impact of architecture choices on convergence and accuracy.
- Analysed training curves to identify overfitting (train loss 0.81 vs val loss 2.26) and applied corrective techniques like including a bigger max_length tuning for longer synopses.
- Tech Stack: Hugging Face Transformers, PyTorch, Datasets, scikit-learn.

metadata.section: Projects History - Project 2: Finetuning DistilBERT model to predict Movie Genres
metadata.Header 2: Project 2: Finetuning DistilBERT model to predict Movie Genres

documents.content:
## Project 3: Portfolio AI Assistant  
-  Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)chatbot for a portfolio website, enabling context-aware
question answering over personal and project data.
- Designed and implemented end-to-end pipelines for ingestion (parsing, chunking, embedding, vector
storage), retrieval(query embedding, chat history) and generation.
- Implemented session-based conversational memory, allowing responses to leverage historical chat con
text for improved coherence.
- Developed scalable backend API using FastAPI and integrated seamlessly with frontend.
- Evaluated system using retrieval and generation metrics, achieving Recall@3: 1.0, MRR: 1.0, with Con
text Precision: 0.50
- Tech Stack: LangChain, ChromaDB, FastAPI, Docker, Git
- Github Repository: https://github.com/athul-v-nair/portfolio-rag-chatbot

metadata.section: Projects History - Project 3: Portfolio AI Assistant

documents.content:
## Project 4: Text Generation Transformer (From Scratch + MLOps)  
- Implemented a decoder-only Transformer architecture from scratch in PyTorch for autoregressive
text generation using the WikiText-2 dataset.
- Designed core transformer components including multi-head causal self-attention, positional embed
dings, masking, and feed-forward networks.
- Built a modular architecture consisting of token embeddings, stacked transformer blocks, residual connec
tions, and final projection layers.
- Implemented training pipeline with checkpointing, metric logging, and perplexity evaluation.
- Developed multiple text generation strategies including greedy decoding, temperature sampling, top-k,
top-p, and hybrid sampling.
- Created an API inference service using FastAPI and containerized the pipeline using Docker for repro
ducible deployment.
- Github Repository: https://github.com/athul-v-nair/text-generation-mlops

metadata.section: Projects History - Project 4: Text Generation Transformer (From Scratch + MLOps)
metadata.Header 2: Project 4: Text Generation Transformer (From Scratch + MLOps)

documents.content:
## Project 5: Immersify – AI Powered Immersive Reading Experience  
- Immersive Reading Experience for Kids & Visually Impaired
- Developed an AI-powered accessibility application that generates immersive sound experiences during
read-aloud sessions.
- Implemented real-time identification of sound producing words to trigger contextual audio effects
based on detected words (e.g., rain sounds when ”rain” is read).
- Developed an AI-powered immersive reading application that received positive feedback from judges and
participants during a hackathon evaluation.
- Built the backend using AWS Bedrock for model integration and AWS Transcribe for speech-to-text
processing, while storing application data in AWS S3.
- Experimented with AWS OpenSearch to accelerate semantic search and retrieval of contextual audio
triggers; evaluated performance gains against infrastructure cost to guide architectural decisions.

metadata.section: Projects History - Project 5: Immersify – AI Powered Immersive Reading Experience
metadata.Header 2: Project 5: Immersify – AI Powered Immersive Reading Experience
